title: SOL 30pk Coloured Kids Glue Spreader Set – Non-Stick Plastic Spreaders for PVA Glue, Arts & Crafts Accessories, Paint, and Classroom Projects – Flexible, Easy-to-Clean Design for Precise Application
features: Less Mess, More Fun - Using our glue spreaders for PVA glue makes applying, or spreading, glue on wood, cardboard, felt, or on any other surface much easier and less messy. No more messy or stuck together hands!
Precise - The tips of our adults & kids glue spreader were specially created to flex depending on how much pressure you apply. This flexibility provides complete control when using spreading glue.

Non-Stick - Unlike cheaper, or makeshift PVA glue spreader, our glue sticks are made of high quality polypropylene plastic. This means that once you're done, all you need to do is wait for the glue to dry on the tips tip and take it off.

Versatile Use – Our glue spreader sticks are great for spreading glue or thick paint in craft and art projects. The flexible tip helps create patterns and highlights on canvas paintings, making them ideal for kids' crafting and creative work.

Essential for Crafting – Perfect for kids' craft glue projects. Made from polypropylene plastic, these easy-to-clean plastic glue spreaders ensure precise crafting for children’s glue for crafting, painting, and school projects.
description: Product Description Previous page Next page Need a Glue Spreader? Add these items for your DIY Arts and Crafts Project! 30 Coloured Glue Spreader Add To Basket 60pk Glue Spreader Set Add To Basket 30pk Glue Spreader Set Add To Basket 10pk Kids Glitter Tubes Add To Basket 20 Coloured Tissue Paper Add To Basket 100 Coloured Tissue Paper Add To Basket 120pk Long Pipe Cleaners Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.3 out of 5 stars 40 3.9 out of 5 stars 31 3.8 out of 5 stars 236 4.4 out of 5 stars 1,688 4.6 out of 5 stars 3,400 4.7 out of 5 stars 26 4.5 out of 5 stars 973 Price £3.99 £ 3 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £3.99 £ 3 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 £3.49 £ 3 . 49 £9.99 £ 9 . 99 £4.99 £ 4 . 99 Perfect for DIY ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Artistic Style ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Durable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Easy to Use ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Giftable ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ ✔ Can these glue spreaders be used for more than just glue? Yes, these versatile glue spreaders can be used for spreading thick paints in art projects, creating design patterns, or even as highlighting tools. Do the glue spreaders help reduce mess during crafts? Absolutely! Our glue spreaders make applying glue on various surfaces easy and mess-free. No more sticky hands or spills. How do I clean the glue spreaders after use? Simply let the glue dry on the tip, and it will peel off easily, thanks to the non-stick polypropylene plastic used in the spreaders. Are these glue spreaders suitable for kids? Yes, they are perfect for kids and adults alike. The flexible tips allow precise control, making them safe and easy to use in craft projects. How many glue spreaders come in the pack? Each set includes 30 colourful glue spreaders, offering ample supply for all your arts and crafts needs.
